posts.angle: payment rails are improving but card access still blocks teams
posts.copy:
Cross-border payments are getting faster.

Personalize your experience across Google based on your purchases, your way. Teams move faster when payment setup does not slow subscriptions, ads, or cross-border checkout.

RichXPay supports virtual card for global payments, usdt/usdc top-up, apple pay and subscription use cases.
sourceTitles: Personalize your experience across Google based on your purchases, your way.
We’re adding 3 new ways to make web payments easier and more flexible.
posts.landingSummary: Virtual card for global payments, USDT/USDC top-up, Apple Pay and subscription use cases.
